# Goonv

Thanks for your interest in Goonv!

## Before opening an issue

- Check that you're using **Chrome** on desktop for the live demo
- Confirm you've added an **OpenAI API key** if wake-word answers aren't working
- For local dev, make sure the backend is running (`npm run dev`)

## Bug reports

Please include:

1. Browser / OS
2. FaceTime link type (if relevant)
3. What you expected vs. what happened
4. Console errors (if any)
